mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER WHERE SUB_CD = #{subCode}

SELECT p.SUB_CD, p.COMP_CD, d.DEPT_NM, p.SW_CD, s.SW_NM, p.PARTNER_TYPE_CD, (SELECT CODE_TEXT FROM TC_CODE WHERE CODE_CD = p.PARTNER_TYPE_CD) AS codeText, p.PARTNER_CONTRACT_CD, (SELECT CODE_TEXT FROM TC_CODE WHERE CODE_CD = p.PARTNER_CONTRACT_CD) AS partnerContractCdText, p.CONTRACT_CANCEL_POSSIBLE_YN, p.UPGRADE_POSSIBLE_YN, p.TECHNICAL_SUPPORT_YN, p.VISIT_SUPPORT_YN, p.REGULAR_SERVICE_CD, (SELECT CODE_TEXT FROM TC_CODE WHERE CODE_CD = p.REGULAR_SERVICE_CD) AS regularServiceCdText, p.SUBSCRIPTION_YN, p.REMARK FROM TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER p INNER JOIN TC_DEPT d ON p.COMP_CD = d.DEPT_CD INNER JOIN TS_WORK_SW s ON p.SW_CD = s.SW_CD WHERE d.DEPT_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptNm}, '%') AND p.SUB_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{subCode}, '%') AND s.SW_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{swName}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(SUB_CD) FROM TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER WHERE SUB_CD LIKE CONCAT(#{swCode}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER ( SUB_CD, SW_CD, COMP_CD, PARTNER_TYPE_CD, PARTNER_CONTRACT_CD, CONTRACT_CANCEL_POSSIBLE_YN, UPGRADE_POSSIBLE_YN, TECHNICAL_SUPPORT_YN, VISIT_SUPPORT_YN, REGULAR_SERVICE_CD, SUBSCRIPTION_YN, REMARK, REG_ID, REG_DT ) VALUES ( #{subCode}, #{swCode}, #{compCode}, #{partnerTypeCd}, #{partnerContractCd}, #{contractCancelPossibleYn}, #{upgradePossibleYn}, #{technicalSupportYn}, #{visitSupportYn}, #{regularServiceCd}, #{subscriptionYn}, #{remark}, #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE TS_WORK_SW_PARTNER SET SW_CD = #{swCode}, COMP_CD = #{compCode}, PARTNER_TYPE_CD = #{partnerTypeCd}, PARTNER_CONTRACT_CD = #{partnerContractCd}, CONTRACT_CANCEL_POSSIBLE_YN = #{contractCancelPossibleYn}, UPGRADE_POSSIBLE_YN = #{upgradePossibleYn}, TECHNICAL_SUPPORT_YN = #{technicalSupportYn}, VISIT_SUPPORT_YN = #{visitSupportYn}, REGULAR_SERVICE_CD = #{regularServiceCd}, SUBSCRIPTION_YN = #{subscriptionYn}, REMARK = #{remark}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE SUB_CD = #{subCode}
